properties.serializedData:
{"version":"Notebook/1.0","items":[{"type":1,"content":{"json":"# AI Risk Signals

Cross-surface view of Microsoft 365 Copilot DLP blocks, Shadow AI paste/upload attempts to external AI sites, Insider Risk Management AI-related scores, and correlated risky-AI users. Data flows from Microsoft Purview via Defender XDR, OfficeIRM, and Office 365 connectors."},"name":"header"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"SecurityAlert
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where ProductName has 'Data Loss Prevention' or ProductName has 'Microsoft 365 DLP'
| where AlertName has 'Copilot' or tostring(ExtendedProperties) has_any ('CopilotExperiences','copilotPromptBlock','copilotLabelBlock')
| summarize count() by AlertSeverity, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| render timechart","size":0,"title":"Copilot DLP blocks by severity (7d)","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces"},"name":"copilot-dlp-blocks"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"SecurityAlert
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where ProductName has 'Data Loss Prevention' or ProductName has 'Microsoft 365 DLP'
| extend extProps = tostring(ExtendedProperties)
| where extProps has_any ('chat.openai.com','chatgpt.com','claude.ai','gemini.google.com','bard.google.com','copilot.microsoft.com','poe.com','perplexity.ai','huggingface.co','deepseek.com')
| extend aiSite = case(
    extProps has 'chat.openai.com' or extProps has 'chatgpt.com', 'ChatGPT',
    extProps has 'claude.ai', 'Claude',
    extProps has 'gemini.google.com' or extProps has 'bard.google.com', 'Gemini',
    extProps has 'copilot.microsoft.com', 'Copilot (consumer)',
    extProps has 'perplexity.ai', 'Perplexity',
    extProps has 'poe.com', 'Poe',
    extProps has 'huggingface.co', 'HuggingFace',
    extProps has 'deepseek.com', 'DeepSeek',
    'Other')
| summarize attempts=count() by aiSite
| order by attempts desc","size":0,"title":"Shadow AI paste/upload attempts by target site (7d)","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces"},"name":"shadow-ai-by-site"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"SecurityAlert
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where ProductName has 'Insider Risk'
| where AlertName has 'AI' or tostring(ExtendedProperties) has 'RiskyAIUsage' or tostring(ExtendedProperties) has 'AiUsage'
| summarize count() by AlertSeverity, bin(TimeGenerated, 1d)
| render columnchart","size":0,"title":"Risky AI usage IRM alerts (7d)","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces"},"name":"irm-risky-ai"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"let copilotDlp = SecurityAlert
  | where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
  | where ProductName has 'Data Loss Prevention'
  | where AlertName has 'Copilot' or tostring(ExtendedProperties) has_any ('CopilotExperiences','copilotPromptBlock','copilotLabelBlock')
  | extend user = tostring(parse_json(Entities)[0].Name)
  | summarize copilotBlocks=count() by user;
let shadowAi = SecurityAlert
  | where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
  | where ProductName has 'Data Loss Prevention'
  | where tostring(ExtendedProperties) has_any ('chat.openai.com','chatgpt.com','claude.ai','gemini.google.com')
  | extend user = tostring(parse_json(Entities)[0].Name)
  | summarize shadowAiAttempts=count() by user;
let irmAi = SecurityAlert
  | where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
  | where ProductName has 'Insider Risk'
  | extend user = tostring(parse_json(Entities)[0].Name)
  | summarize irmAlerts=count() by user;
copilotDlp
| join kind=fullouter (shadowAi) on user
| join kind=fullouter (irmAi) on user
| extend user = coalesce(user, user1, user2)
| project user, copilotBlocks, shadowAiAttempts, irmAlerts
| extend totalSignals = (tolong(copilotBlocks)+0) + (tolong(shadowAiAttempts)+0) + (tolong(irmAlerts)+0)
| where totalSignals > 0
| order by totalSignals desc
| take 25","size":0,"title":"Cross-signal AI risk users (7d)","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces"},"name":"cross-signal-users"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"OfficeActivity
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where Operation == 'CopilotInteraction' or Operation startswith 'Copilot'
| summarize interactions=count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| render timechart","size":0,"title":"Copilot interaction volume (7d)","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces"},"name":"copilot-volume"}]}
